_comment: Plan 05.1-07. Flagship Exchange Online (REST v2) read-first admin ops. 8 aliases selected from the 10-op __exo__ catalog produced by plan 05.1-05. Set-Mailbox is included because it is the flagship write op (Microsoft's own REST v2 docs lead with it).

rationale.__exo__get-organization-config: Tenant-wide Exchange Online configuration read; baseline grounding for any admin flow (domain + retention + mail flow defaults).
rationale.__exo__get-accepted-domain: Accepted-domain enumeration; prerequisite for mail-flow / connector / recipient governance.
rationale.__exo__get-mailbox: Single-mailbox read; the most-used Exchange cmdlet (Get-Mailbox). Included even though Set-Mailbox is the flagship write.
rationale.__exo__set-mailbox: Single-mailbox update; REST v2's flagship write op. Kept in essentials because mailbox attribute edits are the dominant admin workflow.
rationale.__exo__get-mailbox-folder-permission: Folder-permission read (e.g., Shared Calendar ACLs); frequent ask for delegation audit.
rationale.__exo__add-mailbox-folder-permission: Folder-permission grant; companion write op to Get-MailboxFolderPermission for typical delegate-setup workflows.
rationale.__exo__get-distribution-group-member: Distribution-list membership enumeration; required for DL audit / governance.
rationale.__exo__get-dynamic-distribution-group-me: Dynamic-DL member preview (filter expansion); required for dynamic-DL governance and validation of recipient filters.
